rules.title: block large ai trader notional
rules.description: block AI-Trader realtime trades whose notional value is greater than 5000
rules.message: AI-Trader 单笔交易名义金额超过 5000，已拦截。

rules.title: block ai trader short actions
rules.description: block AI-Trader short actions unless a user explicitly changes this rule
rules.message: 当前策略不允许发布做空交易信号。

rules.title: require polymarket outcome context
rules.description: block Polymarket trades when both outcome and token_id are missing
rules.message: Polymarket 交易缺少 outcome 或 token_id，已拦截。

rules.title: block out of scope pentest actions
rules.description: block pentesting actions when the target is not explicitly in scope
rules.message: 目标不在授权测试范围内，已拦截。

rules.title: block destructive pentest actions
rules.description: block destructive exploit actions even when a target is in scope
rules.message: 当前动作属于破坏性漏洞利用，已拦截。

rules.title: block many external email recipients
rules.description: block send_email when more than 3 external recipients are present
rules.message: 外部收件人数量超过用户设定阈值，已拦截。

rules.title: block broad external email domain fanout
rules.description: block send_email when recipients span more than 2 external domains
rules.message: 外部收件人域名过于分散，已拦截。

rules.title: block browser sensitive submit
rules.description: block browser side-effect actions that submit credential or local config content
rules.message: 浏览器动作疑似提交密码、令牌或本地配置内容，已拦截。

rules.title: block live exploit against production
rules.description: block source-aware AppSec agents from running live high-impact PoCs against production targets
rules.message: 当前 AppSec PoC 会攻击生产环境，已拦截。

rules.title: block large external egress
rules.description: block external egress whose lowered payload size is within the high-volume exfiltration band
rules.message: 外部数据传输体量过大，已拦截。

rules.title: block broad cloud iam permission changes
rules.description: block cloud IAM changes when requested scopes are not a subset of the approved low-risk scope set
rules.message: 云权限变更超出允许的低风险权限集合，已拦截。

rules.title: block browser submit to paste sites
rules.description: block browser side-effect actions that submit content to untrusted paste or snippet hosting sites
rules.message: 浏览器动作会向未信任的 paste/snippet 站点提交内容，已拦截。

rules.title: block generated changes on protected branches
rules.description: block repository mutations on release branches when lowered change labels indicate generated code or security configuration updates
rules.message: release 分支上的生成代码或安全配置变更需要人工处理，已拦截。

rules.title: block retrieval query with multiple pii labels
rules.description: block retrieval/search queries whose lowered labels contain at least two direct personal-data identifiers
rules.message: 检索请求同时包含多个个人数据标识，已拦截。

required_metadata.description: Absolute trade notional computed as price * quantity.
required_metadata.normalization: Use absolute numeric price * quantity. Price 0 means platform simulated pricing and may produce 0 notional before execution.

required_metadata.description: True when the AI-Trader action is short.
required_metadata.normalization: action lowercased equals short.

required_metadata.description: True when market is polymarket.
required_metadata.normalization: market lowercased equals polymarket.

required_metadata.description: True when a non-empty Polymarket outcome is present.
required_metadata.normalization: outcome is a non-empty string.

required_metadata.description: True when a non-empty Polymarket token_id is present.
required_metadata.normalization: token_id is a non-empty string.

required_metadata.description: True when the current tool call is part of a penetration testing or vulnerability validation action.
required_metadata.normalization: Classify reconnaissance, scanning, exploitation, fuzzing, browser exploit validation, or vulnerability probing as pentest actions.

required_metadata.description: True only when the target host, URL, IP, or repository is explicitly within the authorized test scope.
required_metadata.normalization: Compare extracted targets against the configured authorized scope for the run.

required_metadata.description: True when the action may destroy data, modify production state, persist payloads, or cause denial of service.
required_metadata.normalization: Classify destructive exploit, DoS, data deletion, persistence, credential spraying, and privilege escalation attempts as destructive.

required_metadata.description: Number of email recipients outside the configured organization domains.
required_metadata.normalization: Count recipients whose email domain is outside the configured organization domains.

required_metadata.description: Distinct external recipient domains after organization domains are removed.
required_metadata.normalization: Extract and uppercase distinct external domains from all recipient fields.

required_metadata.description: True when the browser action may submit, upload, click, confirm, or otherwise mutate page-visible state.
required_metadata.normalization: Classify submit, upload, click, dialog accept, form interaction, or navigation with side effects as true.

required_metadata.description: Labels for sensitive content being submitted by a browser action.
required_metadata.normalization: Return uppercase labels such as PASSWORD, TOKEN, API_KEY, LOCAL_CONFIG, or SECRET when submitted browser content contains those classes.

required_metadata.description: True when an AppSec agent is executing a live exploit or PoC against a running target.
required_metadata.normalization: Classify browser/API requests or CLI invocations that actively validate exploitability against a running app as true.

required_metadata.description: Normalized environment for the AppSec target.
required_metadata.normalization: Return one of LOCAL, DEV, STAGING, PRODUCTION, or UNKNOWN when target environment can be inferred.

required_metadata.description: High-level vulnerability classes exercised by the AppSec action.
required_metadata.normalization: Return uppercase vulnerability labels such as RCE, SSRF, SQLI, XSS, AUTH_BYPASS, or IDOR.

required_metadata.description: True when the destination is outside local or organization-controlled boundaries.
required_metadata.normalization: Classify external network destinations, public object storage, external email, or third-party APIs as true.

required_metadata.description: Estimated outbound payload size in megabytes.
required_metadata.normalization: Normalize known byte, KB, MB, or file-size evidence into a numeric MB estimate.

required_metadata.description: True when the current cloud IAM operation creates, updates, grants, binds, or revokes permissions.
required_metadata.normalization: Classify IAM create/update/grant/bind/revoke operations as true.

required_metadata.description: Normalized permission scopes or role classes requested by the current IAM operation.
required_metadata.normalization: Return uppercase role/scope classes such as READ_ONLY, LOG_VIEWER, METRICS_VIEWER, ADMIN, OWNER, WRITE, or SECRET_ACCESS.

required_metadata.description: Normalized hostname of the browser action target.
required_metadata.normalization: Parse the target URL and return the lowercase hostname without scheme, path, query, or credentials.

required_metadata.description: True when the repository action mutates local or remote repository state.
required_metadata.normalization: Classify commit, push, merge, rebase, tag creation, branch update, and config writes as mutating operations.

required_metadata.description: Normalized target branch affected by the repository operation.
required_metadata.normalization: Return a branch/ref name such as main, release/1.2, or feature/foo without remote prefix when safely inferable.

required_metadata.description: Semantic labels for repository changes touched by the operation.
required_metadata.normalization: Return uppercase labels such as GENERATED_CODE, SECURITY_CONFIG, DEPENDENCY_UPDATE, DOCS, TESTS, or PRODUCT_CODE.

required_metadata.description: Sensitive-data labels inferred for a retrieval or search query.
required_metadata.normalization: Return uppercase labels such as SSN, PHONE, EMAIL, CUSTOMER_ID, HEALTH, FINANCIAL, or PUBLIC.
